summary: Comprehensive testing of FREMAX product catalog completed successfully. Backend API (100% success rate) and frontend UI functionality all working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 200 status code instead of 201 for product creation

console_warnings.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for accessibility

passed_tests: Homepage loads with all search tabs (code, application, measurements)
Admin login page accessible and functional
Admin login works with credentials admin/admin123
Admin dashboard shows stats and product management tools
Product creation via admin form works correctly
Search results page displays products correctly
Product datasheet page shows details with all tabs functional
Product line quick links on homepage work
Search by product line filter works
Backend API endpoints all responding correctly (18/18 tests passed)
Search functionality integrated properly with backend
